entry.title: New: Resolution 2026-08 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2026-03-11
entry.content:
Authorizing The Filing Of The Kaua‘i County 2026 Action Plan (Community Development Block Grant) With The Department Of Housing And Urban Development, United States Of America, For A Grant Under Title I Of The Housing And Community Development Act Of 1974 And 1987 (Public Laws 93-383 And 100-242), As Amended

Latest action: On agenda 2026-03-11

View on the council site
